ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This plugin shouldn't scroll if you used a link to the note header like [link](note.md#header). If it did, then increase the delay until everything works. If you are not using links to page sections, set the delay to zero (slider to the left). Slider values: 0-300 ms (default value: 100 ms).
ast.target: 如果你使用了指向笔记标题的链接，如 [link](note.md#header)，此插件不应滚动。如果发生滚动，请增大延迟直到一切正常。如果你不使用指向页面部分的链接，将延迟设为 0（滑块向左）。滑块取值：0-300 ms（默认值：100 ms）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Useful for multi-device users. If you don't want to wait until closing Obsidian to the cursor position been saved.
ast.target: 对多设备用户很有用。如果你不想等到关闭 Obsidian 才保存光标位置。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay after opening a new note

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay between saving the cursor position to file
ast.target: 保存光标位置到文件之间的延迟
